Confidential — Non-public — Deal Codename: Project Lotus (Vietnam strategic investment term sheet, draft for board review only)
Parties: Saigon Meridian Energy JSC (Công ty Cổ phần Năng lượng Hải Đăng Sài Gòn, “Issuer”) and Mekong Crest Capital Co., Ltd. (“Investor”)
Structure: Primary subscription plus secondary purchase totaling 37.5% of issued shares; aggregate consideration VND 1,280,000,000,000; indicative price per share VND 32,000; implied post‑money ownership per cap table
Regulatory/listing: Issuer listed on HCSB (Sàn Cổ phiếu TP.HCM); completion subject to NSOV (Văn phòng Chứng khoán Quốc gia) notification and HCSB disclosure within T+1 after closing; pre‑closing information embargo until 15 July 2026, 17:00 ICT
Definitive agreements: Share Purchase Agreement (SPA), S u b s c r i p t i o n   A g r e e m e n t, Investor Rights Agreement, Escrow Instruction Letter; long‑stop date 30 September 2026
Conditions precedent and MAC/MAE: lender consent, METV (Bộ Năng lượng & Thương mại) permit review, absence of MAE/MAC on Issuer; temporary maintenance outages and routine price‑cap circulars shall not constitute a MAC
Funding mechanics: Escrow at Riverbank Vietnam, District 1 branch; Acct: 88‑XX‑ 4219‑ VN; funds released upon notarized transfer and HCSB acknowledgment; FX hedging via VietTrade Clearing Forward 3M
Governance: Post‑closing board size 5; Investor nominates 2 seats; reserved matters (budget, capex > VND 200,000,000,000, new debt) require 70% approval; earn‑out warrants for 5.0% additional stake if FY2027 EBITDA ≥ VND 450,000,000,000
Contacts: Mr. Phạm Duy Khánh (Chairman) — khanh.pham@saigonmeridian.example; Ms. Thu‑Hà Lê (IR) — thuha.le@sme‑energy.example; tel +84 28 3 123 4567
Disclosure control: Investor‑relations draft is not yet public and must not be released before embargo; draft URL https://vn‑ssc.example/filing?id=SA_ME_2026&stage=draft
Public reference (background only): see public sector note https://moit.example.vn/reports/2020‑power‑sector.pdf, which is stale and general; it does not include Issuer‑specific data nor price‑sensitive information
project management: action items: circulate clean draft, confirm escrow instructions, align board memo, no press until sign; move sprint backlog to monday; spa‑day perks are separate from transaction consideration
Employee/internal codes: EMP‑ VN‑ QN‑ 0726; Issuer IR code I R : S M E ‑ 2 6 / P R ‑ v 2 ; TXN:VN:0X9A‑7B3
Break fees & confidentiality: Reverse break fee VND 25,000,000,000 if NSOV formally blocks; this non‑binding term sheet is not for public dissemination under Vietnam Securities Code Art. 54
Tax & local law: Governing law Vietnam; stamp duty per Decree 12‑VT; compliance with HCSB Listing Rules and Guidance Circular 96/2020/VT‑FIN
Timeline: sign SPA by 30 June 2026; target closing 20 July 2026; embargo ends 15 July 2026; if not closed by long‑stop, parties may terminate without penalty and no MAE is deemed to exist
